label: Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion

node.label: Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion
node.definition: Graph compilers and inference runtimes transform model programs through tracing, lowering, scheduling, operator fusion, code generation, and device-specific execution.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion is to connect Programming languages, compilers & type systems, CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels to downstream capabilities including Model servers & inference runtimes, Quantized inference & compressed deployment, Structured-decoding runtimes.
examples: substrate for Model servers & inference runtimes
substrate for Quantized inference & compressed deployment
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Programming languages, compilers & type systems, CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels.

dependencies.rationale: Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion turns Programming languages, compilers & type systems into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion turns CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion turns Algorithms & data structures into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
